svg.title: Typical Quantum ESPRESSO workflow
svg.desc: A flowchart showing the steps in a standard Quantum ESPRESSO DFT workflow, from structure preparation through SCF, NSCF, post-processing, and analysis.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about structure preparation in Quantum ESPRESSO')
g.text: Build unit cell, set atom positions, choose pseudopotentials

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What convergence tests should I run in Quantum ESPRESSO?')
sendPrompt('How does geometry relaxation work in Quantum ESPRESSO?')
sendPrompt('Explain the SCF calculation step in Quantum ESPRESSO')
sendPrompt('How do I compute the density of states in Quantum ESPRESSO?')
sendPrompt('How do I compute band structure in Quantum ESPRESSO?')
sendPrompt('How do I calculate phonons in Quantum ESPRESSO?')
sendPrompt('What post-processing tools does Quantum ESPRESSO have?')
g.text: Extract DOS, bands, charge density, potentials

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What tools can I use to visualize Quantum ESPRESSO results?')
g.text: Plot bands, DOS, density; interpret results

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What is the final step in a Quantum ESPRESSO DFT study?')
